aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests

1. **Immax Neo Smart Water Timer** (_TZE200_xlppj4f5_):
   - **Request by**: Domingoso
   - **Status**: Open
   - **URL**: [Issue #135](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/135)

2. **Wenzhi Smart Human Presence Sensor & Relay** (_TZE204_clrdrnya_):
   - **Request by**: dmz-86
   - **Status**: Open
   - **URL**: [Issue #1142](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1142)

## Fingerprints Already Supported

The following fingerprints are already supported by existing drivers:

- **Valve Irrigation**: `_TZE200_xlppj4f5`, `_TZ3210_0jxeoadc`
- **Curtain Motor**: `_TZE200_5zbp6j0u`, `_TZE200_nkoabg8w`, `_TZE200_xuzcvlku`, `_TZE200_4vobcgd3`, `_TZE200_nogaemzt`, `_TZE200_r0jdjrvi`, `_TZE200_pk0sfzvr`, `_TZE200_fdtjuw7u`, `_TZE200_zpzndjez`, `_TZE200_wmcdj3aq`
- **Curtain Motor Tilt**: `_TZE200_nkoabg8w`, `_TZE200_xuzcvlku`, `_TZE200_nogaemzt`, `_TZE200_r0jdjrvi`, `_TZE200_zpzndjez`, `_TZE200_wmcdj3aq`
- **Shutter Roller Controller**: `_TZE200_wmcdj3aq`
- **Motion Sensor Radar MMWave**: `_TZE204_clrdrnya`

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate

1. **New Fingerprint from Forks**:
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE20X_xxxxxxxx`
   - **Status**: Open
   - **URL**: [Issue #139](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/139)

## PRs with Useful Changes

1. **Fix HOBEIAN 10G Radar Sensor**:
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE200_rhgsbacq`
   - **Changes**: IAS motion conflict fix, battery read, DP corrections
   - **Status**: Closed (not merged)
   - **URL**: [PR #125](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/125)

2. **Support for _TZ3000_ysdv91bk**:
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_ysdv91bk`
   - **Status**: Closed (not merged)
   - **URL**: [PR #118](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/118)

3. **Bseed 1-Gang Switch with Physical Button Detection**:
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_blhvsaqf`
   - **Status**: Closed (not merged)
   - **URL**: [PR #116](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/116)

4. **Separate Driver for Tuya/Bseed Touch Dimmer**:
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZE200_3p5ydos3`, `_TZE204_n9ctkb6j`
   - **Status**: Merged
   - **URL**: [PR #111](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/111)

5. **Added _TZE204_n9ctkb6j, Lower/Upper Case ID**:
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE204_n9ctkb6j`
   - **Status**: Merged
   - **URL**: [PR #106](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/106)

6. **Make Fingerbot (_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v) Work**:
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v`
   - **Status**: Open
   - **URL**: [PR #1065](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1065)

7. **RGB LED Strip Controller, _TZ3210_eejm8dcr / TS0505B**:
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3210_eejm8dcr`
   - **Status**: Open
   - **URL**: [PR #1075](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1075)

8. **MOES 6 Gang Scene+Switch Driver**:
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3002_vaq2bfcu`
   - **Status**: Open
   - **URL**: [PR #1106](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1106)

9. **Smartplug _TZ3000_ww6drja5**:
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_ww6drja5`
   - **Status**: Open
   - **URL**: [PR #1118](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1118)

10. **PIR 24GHz Radar**:
    - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE200_kb5noeto`
    - **Status**: Open
    - **URL**: [PR #1122](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1122)

11. **GIRIER Contact Sensor & Benexmart 12V RGBCW Dimmable Spotlight**:
    - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_c8zfad4a`
    - **Status**: Open
    - **URL**: [PR #1137](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1137)

12. **Tuya PIR Sensor TS0202**:
    - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`
    - **Status**: Open
    - **URL**: [PR #1166](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)

13. **Add _TZE204_bjzrowv2**:
    - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`
    - **Status**: Open
    - **URL**: [PR #1195](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)

14. **Add _TZ3000_kfu8zapd**:
    - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_kfu8zapd`
    - **Status**: Open
    - **URL**: [PR #1209](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1209)

15. **Garage Door Controller and Combined Fan/Light Drivers**:
    - **Fingerprints**: `_TZE204_lawxy9e2`, `_TZE204_nklqjk62`
    - **Status**: Open
    - **URL**: [PR #1210](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1210)

This summary provides a concise overview of the recent GitHub activity for the Universal Tuya Zigbee app, highlighting new device requests, supported fingerprints, fingerprints from forks, and useful PRs.
